framework_status.limitation: Safe replay covers run-scoped allocation/matrix export comparison, not live dashboard state.
framework_status.next_action: Use saved configs/artifacts; keep Streamlit manual-only.

framework_status.limitation: Run-scoped Stage1/Stage3 slices exist, but do not regenerate B0.
framework_status.next_action: Keep as replay slice; do not promote to full graph regeneration.

framework_status.limitation: Guarded, long-running, skipped by default; not a full B0 regeneration path.
framework_status.next_action: Keep disabled by default; require explicit objective and run-scoped outputs.

framework_status.limitation: Stage4-7 wrappers, Stage11/12 no-live wrappers, and Stage13 SLURM tracking are incomplete.
General new-candidate generation is not a reusable solved pathway.
framework_status.next_action: Define objective weights and edge provenance before any new generator.

framework_status.limitation: Packages existing frozen registered candidates only.
framework_status.next_action: Use for B0/C1 comparison and frozen candidate handoff.

framework_status.limitation: Protocol, split, model, seed, metrics, commands, and result artifacts are not locked here.
framework_status.next_action: Lock KGE protocol before interpreting results.

branches.tested_question: Can a frozen graph remain connected, relation-complete, duplicate-free, and auditable?
branches.output_or_result: 24,683 triples; 139/139 allocated relations; 1 weak component; surplus 6,702; deficit 2,019.
branches.supported_conclusion: B0 is the current frozen connected baseline.
branches.not_supported: B0 is not optimal, not final balanced, and not proof the construction problem is solved.
branches.next_action: Use as baseline only with limitations and KGE protocol lock.

branches.tested_question: Can surplus be reduced by aggressive deletion?
branches.output_or_result: Surplus reduced to 105, but weak components increased to 5,623.
branches.supported_conclusion: Balance can improve by deletion in the tested setup.
branches.not_supported: This does not prove no connected balanced alternative exists.

branches.tested_question: Does Stage13 guarded pruning beat B0 enough to replace it?
branches.output_or_result: C1 preserves connectivity and relation coverage; surplus improves from 6,702 to 6,582, but deficit worsens from 2,019 to 2,359.
branches.supported_conclusion: C1 is a valid comparison candidate.
branches.not_supported: C1 does not supersede B0 under the recorded final decision.

branches.tested_question: Can targeted deletion of generic surplus preserve hard constraints and beat the surplus threshold?
branches.output_or_result: Preserved connectivity and coverage, but surplus was 6,675; only 27 removals accepted.
branches.supported_conclusion: Deletion-only pruning can be safe but too weak under current objective.
branches.not_supported: C2 is not a final candidate and does not solve balance.
branches.next_action: Use as negative evidence against deletion-only next steps.

branches.tested_question: Can eligible replacement pool v1 rescue connectivity-critical generic deletions?
branches.output_or_result: No graph generated; 0 feasible replacements for 473 connectivity-critical bridge-like targets.
branches.supported_conclusion: Eligible pool v1 did not solve the tested bridge-rescue problem.
branches.not_supported: C3 is not a generated graph and does not improve B0/C1/C2.
branches.next_action: Reopen only with a new candidate source or changed operation policy.

branches.tested_question: Can strict allocated replacements remove surplus bridge edges while preserving constraints?
branches.output_or_result: First 200 surplus target bridge edges had 0 feasible strict replacements.
branches.supported_conclusion: Strict C4 is not justified from current frozen evidence.
branches.not_supported: This does not prove all replacement methods fail globally.
branches.next_action: Reopen only with allocated, cut-crossing, surplus-improving candidates.

branches.tested_question: Did eligible pool v1 cross the tested bridge cuts?
branches.output_or_result: 990 rows loaded; 0 crossed any tested cut.
branches.supported_conclusion: The pool failed primarily on bridge-cut crossing coverage.
branches.not_supported: This does not prove future pools cannot cross cuts.
branches.next_action: Build a new cut-aware pool only with explicit objective and frozen evidence.

branches.tested_question: Does broader frozen local evidence contain cut-crossing candidates?
branches.output_or_result: 625 unique cut-crossing candidates found; 546 surplus-reducing candidate-cut pairs were unallocated.
branches.supported_conclusion: Cut-crossing evidence exists locally, but surplus-reducing evidence is unallocated.
branches.not_supported: It does not validate unallocated evidence as canonical allocated replacement.
branches.next_action: Feed auxiliary-labeled branches only; do not call it strict replacement success.

branches.tested_question: Do allocated observed cut-crossing candidates improve balance?
branches.output_or_result: 109 connectivity-preserving H1 moves; 0 balance-improving H1 moves.
branches.supported_conclusion: H1 has connectivity signal but no balance-improving signal.
branches.not_supported: A strict H1 generator is not justified.
branches.next_action: Reopen only with new allocated candidates or changed objective.

branches.tested_question: Can observed unallocated auxiliary edges preserve full connectivity while pruning surplus canonical bridge edges?
branches.output_or_result: Expanded package: 3,643 auxiliary edges, 3,643 canonical removals, surplus 6,702 -> 3,059, full WCC 1, canonical-only WCC 3,471.
branches.supported_conclusion: C5-H2 is structurally successful as an experimental auxiliary-support candidate.
branches.not_supported: It is not canonical-final and not a B0 replacement because connectivity depends on unallocated auxiliary edges.
branches.next_action: Run KGE only after protocol lock and report auxiliary dependence explicitly.

branches.tested_question: Can relation concentration be reduced without losing surplus benefit?
branches.output_or_result: Cap-50 P17 concentration was reduced from 39/50 to 1/50; expanded strategy has P17 share about 0.341.
branches.supported_conclusion: Diversity can reduce concentration under tested policies.
branches.not_supported: Diversity does not remove auxiliary dependence or make the graph canonical-only connected.
branches.next_action: Keep diversity as a selection criterion for auxiliary candidates.

branches.tested_question: Can verified pattern rules synthesize bridge alternatives under bounded frozen evidence?
branches.supported_conclusion: H3 graph generation is not justified from this bounded audit.
branches.not_supported: This does not prove all synthetic methods fail.
branches.next_action: Reopen only with broader source scope or changed bridge-target definition.

branches.tested_question: Can historical graph generation be safely replayed from frozen/local inputs?
branches.output_or_result: Stage1/Stage3 run-scoped slices exist; Stage4 wrapper is guarded; full B0 regeneration is not safe today.
branches.not_supported: Full historical regeneration is not yet reproducible or safe.
branches.next_action: Continue wrapper work only with run-scoped outputs and no-live guards.

branches.tested_question: Can a broader or live source find better cut-aware evidence?
branches.output_or_result: Mentioned as future/non-canonical option; no locked local result.
branches.supported_conclusion: It remains a possible future branch.
branches.not_supported: No claim can be made until results are frozen, hashed, audited, and evaluated.
branches.next_action: Define source boundary and freeze policy before implementation.

branches.tested_question: Can synthetic/pattern-derived methods work beyond the bounded H3 audit?
branches.output_or_result: Bounded H3 found zero candidates; broader synthetic scope is unresolved.
branches.supported_conclusion: Bounded H3 is negative evidence for that scope.
branches.not_supported: It does not globally rule out all synthetic methods.
branches.next_action: Define explicit rule source, thresholds, labels, and evaluation policy before any generation.

branches.tested_question: Do graph variants improve downstream utility?
branches.output_or_result: No locked KGE protocol/result artifact in the inspected reconstruction docs.
branches.supported_conclusion: KGE can become decision evidence only after protocol and results are recorded.
branches.not_supported: No causal diagnosis of weakness is supported yet.
branches.next_action: Lock protocol and artifact hashes before interpreting results.

closed_for_now.reason: Tested endpoint fragmented into 5,623 weak components.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: A method preserves a documented connectivity/component policy while reducing surplus.

closed_for_now.reason: Reduced surplus modestly but increased total deficit relative to B0.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: Reporting objective explicitly prioritizes lower surplus/density over deficit and accepts Stage13.

closed_for_now.reason: Deletion-only pruning accepted only 27 removals and failed the surplus threshold.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: A non-deletion-only operation or new objective is defined.

closed_for_now.reason: Eligible pool v1 did not rescue tested connectivity-critical bridge-like deletions.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: A new replacement pool or explicit operation policy is defined.

closed_for_now.reason: Strict allocated replacement evidence did not produce feasible balance-improving replacements.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: Allocated, cut-crossing, surplus-improving candidates are produced under frozen evidence.

closed_for_now.reason: Eligible pool v1 did not cross tested bridge cuts.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: A cut-aware allocated pool is built and audited.

closed_for_now.reason: Allocated cut-crossing moves preserved connectivity but did not improve balance.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: New allocated candidates or objective changes produce balance-improving moves.

closed_for_now.reason: Bounded synthetic-pattern audit found zero candidates.
closed_for_now.would_reopen_if: Broader source scope or revised target/rule definition is specified.

open_bounded.why_not_final: Surplus-reducing evidence is unallocated and does not validate strict replacement.
open_bounded.minimal_next_test: Determine whether a frozen allocated cut-aware pool can produce surplus-improving replacements.

open_bounded.why_open: Expanded auxiliary package is connected and reduces canonical surplus.
open_bounded.why_not_final: Full connectivity depends on observed unallocated auxiliary edges; canonical-only graph is fragmented.
open_bounded.minimal_next_test: Run locked KGE protocol on B0, full auxiliary graph, and optional canonical-only graph.

open_bounded.why_not_final: Diversity does not remove auxiliary dependence.
open_bounded.minimal_next_test: Compare KGE and relation-distribution effects under one protocol.

open_bounded.why_open: Future candidate sources may produce new cut-aware evidence.
open_bounded.minimal_next_test: Define source boundary and freeze candidate artifacts with hashes.

open_bounded.why_open: Bounded H3 does not globally rule out synthetic approaches.
open_bounded.why_not_final: No broader synthetic candidate artifact exists.
open_bounded.minimal_next_test: Define pattern rules, confidence thresholds, labels, and evaluation policy.

open_bounded.why_not_final: It is not a candidate-quality branch and full regeneration remains unsafe.
open_bounded.minimal_next_test: Run-scoped Stage4-7 wrappers plus no-live Stage11/12 replay policy.

acceptance_criteria: 139/139 allocated relation coverage unless explicitly relaxed
connectivity or a documented component policy
lower surplus and/or lower composition dominance
no hidden auxiliary or synthetic edges
provenance labels for canonical, auxiliary, and synthetic edges
improving one metric alone is not enough
safe_claims: The connected realization exists and is audited.
The connected realization is not perfectly balanced.
Balance-first deletion improves surplus but damages connectivity under the tested setup.
Some replacement and auxiliary branches have bounded evidence.
C5-H2 auxiliary support is promising as an experimental auxiliary branch but not canonical-final.
unsafe_claims: B0 is the final balanced benchmark.
KGE weakness is caused by balance or sparsity without controlled protocol.
Auxiliary edges are canonical allocated evidence.
next_actions: Lock KGE protocol before interpreting KGE.
Decide whether the next KG candidate should be canonical-only or auxiliary-labelled.
If continuing C5-H2, define acceptance criteria before further generation.
If opening a new branch, define objective weights before implementation.
